summary: All three requirements (REQ-30, REQ-31, REQ-32) have been successfully implemented. The 'MOD x RDX' branding text has been added next to the logo in both the homepage and mobile navigation menu with bold sans-serif styling and proper horizontal alignment. The color scheme has been updated to use #7B2EFF (oklch 0.55 0.25 285) throughout the site for both light and dark modes.

hallucinated_features.description: Added 'MOD x RDX' branding text next to the logo in the desktop header navigation (Layout.tsx)
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-31 only requested adding the text in the mobile sheet menu navigation, not in the desktop header. The desktop header modification was not part of the BuildRequest requirements.
